history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile phone screen shows a dark interface with Indonesian text about items stored in the cloud, along with a delete icon and status icons.

The main subject is the smartphone UI display, filling the frame, with a title line at the top and a blue explanatory message box in the center.

Setting:
This appears to be a screenshot of a mobile app or system screen indoors, with no real-world environment visible. The lighting is not applicable beyond the screen’s dark theme. The time shown on the status bar reads 20:39.

Visual Details:
The background is predominantly black or very dark gray. At the top-left, the time “20:39” is displayed in light gray/white next to common status indicators. At the top-right, there are signal bars, a Wi‑Fi icon, and a battery icon showing “60” inside a rounded indicator. Near the top-left there is a back arrow icon. Near the top-right there is a trash can icon. The main title text is centered near the top: large white text reading “Item yang baru-baru ini dihapus.” Under it, a smaller line reads “16,74GB” in light gray. Below, there is a large rounded rectangle in dark blue with blue-tinted text in Indonesian spanning multiple lines. The camera angle is straight-on, like a direct capture of the screen.

Visible Text:
20:39
Item yang baru-baru ini dihapus
16,74GB
Item terhapus yang telah dicadangkan dapat tetap berada di cloud hingga 60 hari. Item yang belum dicadangkan akan disimpan hingga 30 hari.

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of a smartphone screen describing recently deleted items and cloud storage durations. It includes a delete/trash icon and shows the storage amount “16,74GB.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Item yang baru-baru ini dihapus  
16,74GB

Item terhapus yang telah dicadangkan dapat tetap berada di cloud hingga 60 hari. Item yang belum dicadangkan akan disimpan hingga 30 hari.

# Structured Version

## Deleted Items
- Item yang baru-baru ini dihapus
- 16,74GB

## Message
Item terhapus yang telah dicadangkan dapat tetap berada di cloud hingga 60 hari. Item yang belum dicadangkan akan disimpan hingga 30 hari.

# Notes
- [unclear] The exact numeric formatting could also be interpreted as **16,74 GB** (comma as decimal separator), but the screenshot shows **“16,74GB”**.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
